tools.title: Verse Explainer
tools.prompt: Explain this Bible verse with context, meaning, application, and a short prayer.

tools.title: Chapter Summary
tools.prompt: Summarize this Bible chapter with key themes, outline, main lesson, and application.

tools.title: Character Study
tools.prompt: Create a Bible character study with background, strengths, weaknesses, key scriptures, and lessons.

tools.title: Topic Study
tools.prompt: Create a biblical topic study with scriptures, explanation, practical application, and reflection questions.

tools.title: Sermon Builder Pro
tools.prompt: Generate a sermon with title, text, introduction, three main points, illustrations, application, and closing prayer.

tools.title: Bible Lesson Builder
tools.prompt: Build a Bible lesson with objective, scriptures, teaching notes, discussion questions, activity, and prayer.

tools.title: Small Group Builder
tools.prompt: Create a small group guide with icebreaker, Scripture, discussion questions, application, prayer points, and leader notes.

tools.title: Devotion Generator
tools.prompt: Generate an original devotion with story, Bible reading, reflection questions, action step, declaration, and prayer.
